pi_items.source: FDA Package Insert and CDC sources confirm Adacel is one of two Tdap vaccines approved for use in the U.S.

setup_oscar.sh lines 209-222 explicitly configures password 'oscar' with SHA-1 hash 45-179-551441115-117798-30877213-3052-6889-30-60 for this specific Oscar EMR instance (differs from default mac2002)
setup_oscar.sh lines 373-375 confirms PIN 1117; also matches standard Oscar EMR default PIN

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic - not from real pharmaceutical data source
pi_items.source: Lot number is programmatically created in setup_task.sh. Format 'ADC-AUDIT-25' with 'AUDIT' keyword does not match real pharmaceutical lot number patterns documented by CDC/AIRA or Sanofi

privileged_info_summary: Adacel is a real FDA-approved Tdap vaccine (Tetanus Toxoid, Reduced Diphtheria Toxoid and Acellular Pertussis) manufactured by Sanofi Pasteur. The task uses correct credentials for the Oscar EMR instance (oscardoc/oscar/1117), though the password 'oscar' differs from the standard default 'mac2002'. The vaccine lot 'ADC-AUDIT-25' is synthetic, created programmatically via database script with initial quantity 25 units to be updated to 12 units. All metadata claims about quantities, credentials, and vaccine type are verified against authoritative sources.
